# Mindlytics Tools
> Free tools and converter aggregator. 2,000+ tools organised five ways — by category, profession, usage, industry, and life moment. Sydney, Australia.

## What this site is
A free, no-signup tools aggregator. Every everyday converter, calculator, and utility — organised so anyone finds their path in.

## Key tools available
- Live currency converter (ECB / Frankfurter — indicative, no key required)
- Crypto exchange comparison (AU registered, AUSTRAC, ASIC)
- Unit converters, date calculators, finance calculators (client-side, no data stored)
- AI tool discovery — six browse paths
- Pinpoint: AI-powered life-situation roadmap (multilingual)

## Five ways to browse
1. By Category (28 categories)
2. By Profession (20 professions)
3. By Usage (8 patterns)
4. By Industry (12 industries)
5. By Life Moment (12 moments)

## Honesty notes
- All tools are informational only — not financial, medical, or legal advice
- Files processed in browser — never stored on servers
- Currency and crypto data labelled with source and marked indicative
- Affiliate links disclosed

## Contact
Raj Singh · Sydney, Australia · raj@artigellence.com

https://tools.mindlytics.xyz
